name: French Onion Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the beef into 6 serving-size pieces.
2. Layer half of the beef, mushrooms, and onion in a 3 1/2 to 4-quart slow cooker.
3. Repeat layers with the remaining ingredients.
4. Pour the soup over the ingredients in the slow cooker.
5. Cover and cook on low setting for 8 to 10 hours or until the beef is tender and no longer pink.
6. Before serving, mix the stuffing mix and contents of the seasoning packet with melted margarine and 1/2 cup liquid from the pot.
7. Place the stuffing on top of the contents in the slow cooker; cover.
8. Increase the heat to high setting.
9. Cook for 10 minutes or until the stuffing is fluffy.
10. Sprinkle with cheese; cover.
11. Cook until the cheese is melted.
